texts.name: Forlong
texts.biography: Forlong's calm manner often deceives enemies, until their blades begin to glance uselessly from the warriors under his protection. His magic does not flash or roar like lightning or flame; it settles over allies with the strength of ancient bark and living stone. Beneath his ward, even the most fragile warriors of the Sylvan Alliance endure blows that would break others.

specialty.description: Spell bonus: Stone Skin. The hero casts this spell with increased effect.
specialty.name: Stone Skin
